_meta.description: Quiz for maxParallelism immutable trap lesson

questions.question: Почему maxParallelism IMMUTABLE после старта job?

options.text: maxParallelism определяет number of key groups. keyGroupId = murmurHash(key) % maxParallelism. Изменение maxParallelism = вся hash distribution invalid — каждый key назначается другому key group → state distribution destroyed → state lost

questions.explanation: Математика state distribution. maxParallelism = number of key groups (atomic units state distribution). keyGroupId computed via murmurHash(key) % maxParallelism. Each subtask owns range of contiguous key groups (e.g., parallelism=8, maxParallelism=128 → subtask 0 owns KGs 0-15). Change maxParallelism = all hash assignments invalid = state distribution destroyed = state lost. Not bug, fundamental math. Не fixable by Flink without rebuilding state distribution offline (State Processor API rebootstrap).
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Что такое maxParallelism + Почему immutable

questions.question: Production job 1.5TB state, parallelism=32, maxParallelism=128 (default). Autoscaler хочет 256 parallelism. Что делать?

options.text: Restore с parallelism > maxParallelism FAILS. Единственное решение: State Processor API offline rebootstrap. Stop с canonical savepoint, write batch job reading old state и writing new savepoint с maxParallelism=2048 (headroom). 1.5TB = 3-4 часа downtime. Restart streaming с new savepoint
Изменить config во flink-conf.yaml и рестартовать

questions.explanation: Production trap. Restore fails 'Cannot restore: max parallelism = 128, requested = 256'. Solution: rebootstrap state. Workflow: (1) canonical savepoint; (2) State Processor batch job — read old state with old maxParallelism=128, BootstrapTransformation для new key group distribution, SavepointWriter.newSavepoint(env, backend, 2048) с new maxParallelism; (3) 1.5TB ~ 3-4 hours batch processing на distributed cluster (16+ parallelism, big disks); (4) Validate new savepoint; (5) Restart streaming с new savepoint, unblocked scale до 256. Lesson: ALWAYS setMaxParallelism(1024+) при first deploy — free insurance.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Production trap + Rebootstrap workflow + KnowledgeCheck

questions.question: Правильный maxParallelism для нового production job в 2026?

options.text: 1024 минимум (sweet spot — ~1% overhead, 8x headroom если planned parallelism ~100). Rounded к power-of-2. Higher (2048, 4096) если truly massive scale planned. 32768 — maximum allowed

questions.explanation: 1024 — sweet spot для most production. Math: planned parallelism × 4-8x headroom. Plan 100 eventually → 512-1024 minimum. 1024 → ~1% overhead, незаметно. 2048-4096 OK для truly massive scale. 32768 — noticeable overhead, only для 10000+ subtasks. 128 default — landmine, plus easy to leave at default and forget. Set explicitly via setMaxParallelism(1024) or pipeline.max-parallelism: 1024 config. Per-operator may differ — source bounded by Kafka partitions, heavy state operator high maxParallelism.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Set maxParallelism upfront + Math: правильный maxParallelism

questions.question: `pipeline.max-parallelism` (= maxParallelism, immutable) и `jobmanager.adaptive-scheduler.max-parallelism` (scheduler upper bound, mutable) — это две РАЗНЫЕ настройки, легко путать.
questions.explanation: True. Two separate concepts often confused. `pipeline.max-parallelism` (или setMaxParallelism()) — number of key groups, IMMUTABLE after job start, default 128. `jobmanager.adaptive-scheduler.max-parallelism` — scheduler upper bound на parallelism, CAN change в config, ограничивает autoscaler. Scheduler max ≤ pipeline max (key groups limit). Can have scheduler max=200 + pipeline max=1024 — allows scaling up to 200 currently, but key groups support up to 1024 future. Common gotcha: bumping scheduler max-parallelism в надежде на больше parallelism, но pipeline max-parallelism стопит — реальный hard limit.
